notes.shadowPattern: Soft UI design system uses multi-layer shadows for subtle depth. Consistent with design-system-context.json shadowStyle definition.
notes.radiusPattern: Extracted 14 unique radius values from design system. Includes semantic aliases for common sizes (DEFAULT=8px, sm=4px, md=8px, lg=16px, xl=24px, full=35px).
notes.focusShadow: Focus ring uses primary color overlay (rgba(226, 147, 211, 0.50)) matching magenta accent theme.
notes.blurs: Two backdrop blur values detected from sidebar and floating elements. Values are precise Figma measurements (rounded to 2 decimals).
